title: dw-kit Review Render Manifest
description: Structured findings manifest produced by /dw:review --visual and consumed by `dw review render` + dw-kit-render. Versioned public API surface — see ADR-0007.

schema_version.description: Manifest schema version. Renderer rejects mismatched versions with clear error.

scope.description: Review scope identifier (branch slug, task slug, or arbitrary label). NOT used directly as path — caller must sanitize via scope-slug util.

scope_slug.description: Sanitized scope used as directory name under .dw/reviews/. Filesystem-safe on Windows + POSIX.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when manifest was produced.

task_id.description: Optional link to .dw/tasks/{task_id}/ — enables /dw:execute to load findings as fix targets.

reviewer.description: Skill or agent name that produced this manifest (e.g. 'dw-review').

diff_base.description: Git ref the review was computed against (e.g. 'main', 'origin/dev').

id.description: Unique finding ID within the manifest. Used as artifact filename: finding-{id}.svg / .png.

severity.description: Drives banner color in rendered artifact.

title.description: One-line summary shown as the card heading.

file.description: Repo-relative path. Forward slashes regardless of OS.

rule_ref.description: Optional rule/standard reference shown in card subhead.

body.description: Finding explanation (markdown allowed in rendered output, plain text safe fallback).

fix.description: Optional concrete fix suggestion shown as action banner.

code_snippet.description: Raw code lines from `location` range. Pulled by the LLM during manifest generation; renderer does not re-read source files. Cap at ~50 lines around finding.

language.description: Language identifier for syntax highlighting (e.g. javascript, python, go). Defaults to plain text in renderer if absent or unknown.
